key_concepts_covered: Badge and certificate eligibility (participation vs. code labs)
Four project tracks (Good, Business, Concise, Freestyle)
Team formation rules (individual or up to 4)
Number of winners (3 per track, 12 total)
Submission requirements (media gallery, project link, write-up)
Kaggle write-up details (word count, cover image, documentation)
Evaluation criteria (AASN, multi-agent, MCP, security, deployability, agent skills)
Evaluation scoring breakdown (30 marks for core concept, 70 for code/docs)
